title: AI/ML Engineering Summer Internship
description:
Background
Knaq builds IoT monitoring technology for a range of industrial equipment that combines custom-built hardware with cloud-based analytics and AI. Our hardware sends real-time data to cloud-based infrastructure that presents live equipment information, alerting, and predictive analytics.
We’re looking for motivated computer science/data engineering students to join our small, engineering-focused team over the summer of 2026 as interns. This role will primarily focus on developing more robust predictive models using AI/ML. This is a full-time and in-person in Lower Manhattan, New York City. There is a $3.2k/month stipend and we can work with your university to provide class credit.
Expected experience
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or foreign degree equivalent. Currently working towards a master’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or foreign degree equivalent. 1+ years of experience in AI/ML engineering or data science, with a strong understanding of statistical modeling and predictive methods
Responsibilities
Work with the lead SWE and leadership team to develop data models aimed at predicting machine failure in advance.
This role is designed to give you hands-on experience developing data models that will be actively used in the field;
Utilize statistical reasoning and methods to analyze and provide usable insights on large datasets;
Use quantitative analysis skills to identify anomalies in dataset that predict equipment failures;
Proactively identify areas for improvement on our current predictive models and data architecture;
Create clear visualizations to present insights and create detailed documentation of your work throughout the summer.
Hold yourself to high standards for independent work and initiative.
Contact
If interested in applying, please send a resume, along with any relevant work samples, and a brief (few sentences) statement about why our company interests you to careers@knaq.io.
